title: Here’s how to make study notebooks in the Gemini app.
gist: Google's Gemini app adds 'study notebooks,' a personalized learning feature that generates tailored bite-sized lessons and practice quizzes based on a user's stated learning goal, with a dashboard tracking progress and knowledge gaps.

insights.claim: The Gemini app has launched 'study notebooks,' a feature designed to help users organize studying and learn more efficiently, positioned as a personalized learning space.
insights.speaker: Lindsey Lanquist
insights.so_what: Marks Google's continued push to embed AI tutoring/education workflows directly into its consumer Gemini app, competing for the AI-assisted learning use case.
insights.quote: Study notebooks, a new feature in the Gemini app, can help you get organized and learn more efficiently.

insights.claim: In study notebooks, users tell Gemini what they want to learn and the app generates bite-sized lessons tailored to the user's individual strengths and knowledge gaps.
insights.speaker: Lindsey Lanquist
insights.so_what: Shows Gemini moving beyond generic Q&A into adaptive, personalized curriculum generation — a differentiator versus static study tools.
insights.quote: You tell Gemini what you want to learn, and it helps you get there with bite-sized lessons tailored to your strengths and knowledge gaps.
insights.locator: Think of study notebooks as a personalized learning space

insights.claim: Study notebooks include practice quizzes that test the user's understanding as they progress through generated lessons.
insights.speaker: Lindsey Lanquist
insights.so_what: Adds an assessment loop to the feature, a component needed for the tool to credibly compete with dedicated ed-tech quiz/study apps.
insights.quote: Along the way, Gemini will test your understanding with practice quizzes.
insights.locator: Along the way, Gemini will test your understanding

insights.claim: A custom dashboard in study notebooks tracks user progress and helps identify what to prioritize studying next, intended to reduce time spent figuring out what to focus on and speed up mastering new subjects.
insights.speaker: Lindsey Lanquist
insights.so_what: The progress-dashboard/prioritization mechanic is the feature's core retention hook, encouraging repeat engagement with the Gemini app for ongoing study needs.
insights.quote: And you can track your progress on a custom dashboard that helps you pinpoint what to prioritize next.
insights.locator: Along the way, Gemini will test your understanding
